sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24052" key="dendrofore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δενδρο-φορέω</orth>, <sense id="n24052.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to bear trees</tr_> in procession, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.37</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
